_comment: Default-value reference for run_arch_spectral_depth_irrelevance.py — the §9.1 tied-weight α-sweep depth-irrelevance experiment. Mirrors the ArchSpectralDepthIrrelevanceConfig dataclass defaults. The script does NOT auto-load this JSON; to override defaults pass CLI flags. See EXPERIMENT_PLAN_FINAL.MD §9.1 and thesis/theorem_b.txt Corollary (modewise gradient-flow dynamics and long-context depth irrelevance). This is architecture-aligned validation of theorem-B depth-irrelevance under tied weights — NOT an exact theorem proof. Companion to the existing decoupled-weight run_arch_spectral_linear_stationary.py canonical run.
